title: Certified Nursing Assistant
description: Johns Hopkins Medicine, renowned for clinical excellence and research innovation, seeks a Certified Nursing Assistant for our San Jose location. You'll provide direct patient care, support nurses, and contribute to patient comfort and recovery. Join a world-class healthcare system dedicated to exceptional patient outcomes.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care under nursing supervision
Assist patients with personal hygiene, grooming, and activities of daily living
Monitor and report patient vital signs and comfort concerns
Maintain clean and safe patient environments
Support nursing staff with patient care procedures
Contribute to patient communication and emotional support

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; CNA certification required
skills: Physical stamina and ability to lift and move patients
Attention to patient comfort and safety
Understanding of patient confidentiality and HIPAA

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Shift flexibility and paid time off
Access to Johns Hopkins education and development programs
